economic_notes: Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) reported revenue of $10,067,947 and net earnings of $3,455,649 for 2021. Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated proportionately consolidated as government partnership. La Ronge Wild Rice Corporation held as portfolio investment (5.3%). Operations impacted by COVID-19; received additional ISC COVID funding. SIGA Casino closures reduced First Nations Trust and Northern Lights CDC revenue.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit signed August 4, 2022 — significant delay. Net debt position of $2,940,548. Education expenses combined Post Secondary ($2,892,828) and Education ($5,852,777) = $8,745,605. Social Support Services ($773,763) and Band Activities ($2,018,385) not mapped to standard categories. ISC COVID funding of $3,274,758 received and partially deferred. First Nations Bank loan covenant violation noted from July 2021. A&T Settlement reserve of $658,001 present. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text. Canada claim settlement of $2,056,624 was a prior year (2020) item only.
